heading: Every knife here, I made myself
body:
I'm Nicky Badenhorst, and I make every knife you see here by hand, one at a time, from my workshop in Johannesburg. What started as a fascination with how a good blade is made has become the way I spend my days — shaping the steel, fitting handles from wood, horn and other natural materials, and finishing each piece until it's something I'd be proud to carry myself.

I'm not a factory. No two knives are exactly alike, and every one is built to be used — in the field, in the kitchen, or kept as something to pass on. If you have a knife in mind, tell me what you're after and we'll make it together.
